title: The shortcut pattern
drDigitalIntro: Here's the secret: you don't have to memorize dozens of shortcuts. Almost all of them follow one pattern — hold Command and press a letter to do something. C copies, V pastes, X cuts, A selects all, Z undoes, S saves, P prints, F finds, N makes a new one, W closes, and T opens a new tab. Once you see the pattern, they're easy to remember!
drDigitalSuccess: You've got the pattern — Command plus a letter. That unlocks almost every shortcut!
drDigitalHint: Take your time with the pattern, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
